message:
feat(cli): implement wa show and wa get-text commands

Both commands were TODO stubs printing "not yet implemented".

- wa show <pane_id>: displays pane details (tab, window, domain,
  title, size, cursor, etc.) with optional --output for recent text
- wa get-text <pane_id>: outputs captured text from a pane, with
  optional --escapes to include ANSI sequences

Both use the existing wezterm handle API (get_pane, get_text).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
